S.FORM: Ray Anthony kawas tay 1922, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 1, Ray Anthony, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: raj antħonj kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, raj antħonj, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ

S.PHON: raj antħonj kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, raj antħonj, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
